_meta.produced_by: Cowork session loaded with phase-b-business-architecture/roles/wiki-pm.md as persona + phase-requirements-management/wiki-requirements-collection.md as activation, classification operation
_meta.discipline: Per ADR 0015 dec 3, this is the LLM-as-judge harness for WP-07..WP-14 — the agent's classification per fixture is captured here as boolean / categorical signals; runner does mechanical scoring (substring match) over these answers. No free-text judgement leaks into the score.
_meta.rerun: When the Wiki PM persona changes, re-classify each fixture and update this file; the per-case score may move.

WP-07.rationale: Triple-trail и так далее filler — closes a list of synonyms (переживать, страдать, мучиться) with three chained и так далее tokens, no information beyond the three already-enumerated synonyms; pattern P1.

WP-08.rationale: Spoken word-doubling for emphasis — the noun эмпатические отношения is anchored by repetition; carries no information beyond first occurrence; pattern P2.

WP-09.rationale: Self-Q&A scaffolding — rhetorical question (Все ли это?) lifting the next claim (Тоже далеко не все); the question carries no information of its own; pattern P3.

WP-10.rationale: Definition with explicit external attribution to Ганс Селье — substantive testable claim with verifiable provenance (Selye founded the stress-theory; the definition is paraphraseable to peer-reviewed sources).

WP-11.rationale: Branded-method self-citation framing — Курпатов's signature 'я сам автор СПП' move; first occurrence within a source carries the attribution and is voice-preservation Form; subsequent occurrences in the same source become Air.

WP-12.rationale: Direct-address scenario / thought experiment ('А теперь представьте…') — Курпатов signature move; the scenario is the content (the mental image survives where the abstract claim wouldn't).

WP-13.rationale: Synonym chain identifying a concept under multiple labels (контакт ≈ рапорт ≈ доверительные отношения); voice signature; the chain compression also serves Reading speed when condensed, but the first appearance is Form because the equation IS the substance.

WP-14.rationale: Triple-trail и так далее filler in isolation — pure Air; the same pattern as WP-07 but without preceding content.
